blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
